commands: set -euo pipefail; if grep -E "^STRIPE_PRICE_" /etc/fjcloud/env; then echo "unexpected_stripe_price_keys_present" >&2; exit 11; else echo "no_stripe_price_keys"; fi; grep -qE "^STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=" /etc/fjcloud/env; echo "STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=<redacted-present>"; grep -qE "^STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=" /etc/fjcloud/env; echo "STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=<redacted-present>"; grep -qE "^STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=" /etc/fjcloud/env; echo "STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<redacted-present>"
